title: Enchantments Plus
description: Adds some enchantments and tweaks some of the already existing ones.
body:
Adds three new enchantments, and tweaks crossbow and bow enchantments.
- Adds knockback resitance enchantment. The enchantment gos up to level 4 and only works on chestplates. When combined with full netherite it makes you compleatly immune to knockback. The enchantment can be obtained through enchanting, trading and in loot chests.
- Adds light weight enchantment. The enchantment gos up to level 2 and only works on the elyta. It decreases gravity, but increases knockback. The enchantment can be obtained by looting end city chests.
- Adds sculk speed enchantment. The enchantment is the same as soul speed, but for sculk. The enchantment can be obtained by looting ancient city chests.
- Tridents can be enchanted with sharpness.
- Sharpness is incompatible with impaling.
- Axes can be enchanted with sharpness in enchanting tables.
- Infinity, multishot, piercing, power and punch can be put on bows and crossbows.
- Mending and infinity can be used together.
- Infinity, piercing and multishot are incompatible with each other.
- End citys can have randomly enchanted books in loot chests.
